candidate_formula: dV_collar = J(Y,rho) dA d rho; J=det(I +/- rho S)=sqrt(det h(Y,rho)/det h(Y,0))
claim_boundary: Standard smooth-collar geometry supplies the symbolic measure formula, but BHSM-specific metric, shape, and orientation data remain open.
evidence_against: the complete BHSM collar action, evaluated h_AB, S(Y), and orientation are not derived
evidence_for: the collar Jacobian identity is DERIVED_CONDITIONAL
induced-metric and first-order curvature forms are localized
